license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.sfnebme
title: Determination of flavonoid content
author: Jorge Carlos Ruiz Ruiz

steps_raw.instruction: An aliquot of sample (0.1 mL) was mixed with 0.4 ml distilled water in a 1.5 mL microcentrifuge tube.
0.03 mL of 5% NaNO 2 was added and the mixture was allowed to react for 5 min.
Following this, 0.03 mL of 10% AlCl 3 was added and the mixture stood for a further 5 min.
Finally, the reaction mixture was treated with 0.2 mL of 1 M Na 2 CO 3 and 0.24 mL distilled water, and the absorbance at 510 nm.
Catechin (Sigma-Aldrich) was used as the standard and the results were expressed as µg/mL of catechin equivalents (CE).
